meaning: n.(作单数用)制图法,制图学,图表算法,图形
examples: My job is to lay out the text and graphics on the page.
Bring file presentation to life by adding graphics.
Graphics are used extensively in natural sciences and social sciences.
Jim Clark, who started Silicon Graphics and Healtheon and cofounded Netscape, was an extreme example of this type.
Intel competes with AMD and Nvidia in the CPU and graphics business.
